meta.title: DEF CON 29 HHV - Ben Gardiner - A Lazy Solve of @mediumrehr's HHV Challenge 6
meta.description: Join Ben for an informal let’s play of @mediumrehr’s Hardware Hacking Village challenge 6. Some topics we will cover include: radare2 , AVR assembly, 7 segment displays, and sigrok. It should be fun and relaxed with plenty of time to stop and re-do some steps if something needs more deliberation. See you there.
